title: Fix accessibility violations on the store landing page
description:
# Issue #102 - Accessibility audit failed

An audit of our landing page (starter/index.html) found WCAG violations:
- the <html> element has no lang attribute
- images have no alt text (screen readers announce the filename)
- form inputs have no associated <label> elements
- the submit button has no type attribute

**Acceptance criteria:**
- html has a lang attribute
- every img has non-empty alt text
- every text/email/password input has an id with a matching <label for=...> (with visible text) or an aria-label
- the form button declares type=\"submit\"
optimal_hint: Ideal fix: lang=\"en\" on <html>, descriptive alt text on all three images, <label for> wired to input ids (placeholder alone is not a label), and type=\"submit\" on the button. Empty alt=\"\" should only be accepted for decorative images, which these are not.
